query: Create a weather widget that shows temperature and conditions
expected_behavior: Uses /** @jsxImportSource mcp-use/jsx */, imports a plain React component (e.g. components/WeatherCard.tsx), returns <WeatherCard ... _output={text(...)} _invoking _invoked _csp as needed />. No widget: { name }, no resources/ folder requirement, no widgetMetadata export.

query: My widget shows undefined for the city name
expected_behavior: Diagnoses missing isPending check. Widget renders before tool completes; props empty until then. Guard on isPending before reading useWidget().props.

query: I want the widget to call another tool when a button is clicked
expected_behavior: Uses useCallTool(toolRef) with a ToolRef from server.tool(), or useCallTool('name'). Shows callTool({ ... }) with typed args when using ToolRef.

query: How do I stream partial results into the widget UI?
expected_behavior: Mentions streamable() on the server as a prop and useStreamableProps() or streaming notifications in the widget; links to response helpers / MCP Apps docs pattern.

query: Duplicate tool or legacy exposeAsTool confusion
expected_behavior: Explains primary pattern is server.tool returning JSX; avoid legacy exposeAsTool + separate auto tool unless migrating old code.
